case_title: SINAI MEMORIAL CHAPEL VS. VERA PEDROZA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $542.21 FILED BY SINAI MEMORIAL CHAPEL AS TO DEFENDANT PEDROZA, VERA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-22-2014 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER GRANTING REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER TO CANCEL DISMISSAL
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-18-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUN-01-2015 ORDERED DESTROYED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-18-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-19-2015 BY JUDGE PRO TEM ROBERT SHEPPARD. THE PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. THE PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED THROUGH DANIEL SHIMER (TITLE: AGENT FOR S.M.C.). THE DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. MEDIATION ATTEMPT WAS UNSUCCESSFUL. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBIT WAS RETAINED. PRO TEM ROBERT SHEPPARD, CLERK KEVIN LEE, NOT ON THE RECORD, D506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SINAI MEMORIAL CHAPEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PEDROZA, VERA $132.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $207.00, $132.00 WHICH WAS SATISFIED BY DEFENDANT'S TENDER OF A PERSONAL CHECK IN COURT TO PLAINTIFF'S REPRESENTATIVE DANIEL SHINER ON MARCH 18, 2015. SAID CHECK MUST CLEAR OR PLAINTIFF MAY OBTAIN JUDGMENT FOR $132.00 ($00.00 WAIVED BY PLAINTIFF) AND $75.00 PER STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
